name: Hit-Em Here
address: 1790 E Columbia Ave, Battle Creek, MI 49014
about: Hit-Em Here is a family-owned and operated entertainment center in Battle Creek, MI, established over 40 years ago. The venue offers a diverse range of indoor activities including mini-golf, a driving range, baseball and softball batting cages, a family-friendly arcade, and indoor golf simulators. It is structured to provide a fun, welcoming atmosphere for visitors of all ages, with a focus on family outings and group events. The facility operates with flexible hours to accommodate various schedules and offers services such as event space rental for groups of 200+ people and a year-round snack bar for in-house food options.
why_golfers_like_it: Offers indoor golf simulators with over 80 courses to choose from
Provides a realistic golfing experience with swing feedback
Features a convenient snack bar for in-between game refreshments

food_and_drink.notes: On-site snack bar open year-round offering ice cream, popcorn, and other snacks during operating hours. Greaseless fryers are used for all orders. Guests can bring their own food and drinks for events or choose from a custom catering menu.
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy on website.

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: The venue has batting cages where guests can bring their own gear or use equipment provided on-site. For the golf simulators, standard golf clubs would be required, though details on club rentals are not specified.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, for events, guests can bring their own food and drinks. Additionally, there is a year-round on-site snack bar available for all visitors during operating hours.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration required to complete 18 holes of simulator play. Advance booking is required for the indoor golf simulators, which offer over 80 courses to choose from.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Hit-Em Here is explicitly described as a family fun center with activities for all ages, including mini-golf, batting cages, and an arcade, making it a kid-friendly venue.
